mapper.insert: insert into wf_process_definition (id, name, display_name, type, instance_url, state, content, version, create_time, creator) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{displayName}, #{type}, #{instanceUrl}, #{state}, #{bytes, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.BlobTypeHandler}, #{version}, #{createTime}, #{creator})
mapper.update: update wf_process_definition set name= #{name}, display_name = #{displayName}, state = #{state}, instance_url = #{instanceUrl}, create_time = #{createTime}, creator = #{creator} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select max(version) from wf_process_definition where name = #{name}
